name: cognis-code
displayName: Cognis Code — local uncensored AI agent
description: A private, uncensored, fully-local coding agent in VS Code. Runs on your own fleet (Ollama/llama.cpp), builds and runs shell commands intelligently, edits files, and loads only the relevant repos/MCPs into context. No cloud, no keys, no limits.

chatParticipants.name: cognis
chatParticipants.description: Local uncensored agent — ask, edit, run, and use tools/connectors

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Run a task as an agent (shell + files, guarded)

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edit the active file/selection per an instruction

languageModelTools.name: cognis_shell
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a shell command in the workspace and return its output. Guarded against destructive commands.

languageModelTools.name: cognis_editFiles
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or replace the full contents of one or more workspace files (multi-file edit, shown as a diff).

languageModelTools.name: cognis_capability
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Select and run the most relevant repo/tool from the 400+ Cognis capabilities for a task.

languageModelTools.name: cognis_connector
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Call a connector's real action: github(whoami|list_repos|create_issue) slack(post) discord(post) notion(search) telegram(send) openweather(current) brave(search) gmail(send|list). Live API results.

commands.title: Cognis Code: Edit Selection with Instruction

cognisCode.endpoint.description: Local fleet endpoint (Ollama /api/chat or cognis-code serve).

cognisCode.codeModel.description: Code-specialized model for completions & edits. Default routes to the GPU coder (qwen3-coder-30b) via codeEndpoint; use 'codellama:13b' to keep it on Ollama.

cognisCode.codeEndpoint.description: Endpoint for the code model. LM Studio (OpenAI :1234) for the GPU coder, or blank to reuse the main Ollama endpoint.

cognisCode.verify.description: After the agent edits code, auto-run the detected test/build and feed failures back to fix (the coding-quality multiplier).

cognisCode.autonomous.description: If true, the agent runs proposed shell commands automatically (guarded). If false, you approve each.

cognisCode.inlineCompletions.description: Enable inline ghost-text completions from the local model.

cognisCode.capabilitiesCmd.description: Command that returns relevant repos/MCPs for intelligent context loading (blank to disable).

cognisCode.maxSteps.description: Max agent tool-loop steps per task.
